page: Microsoft Azure M416ds_10_v3 is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the MDSHighMemoryv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. This instance features 416 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel processors, paired with 9496.0 GB of system memory. This configuration yields a high memory-to-core ratio of 22.83 GB per vCPU. The server includes 410 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-performance external disk attachments.

Designed for massive enterprise workloads, this server offers extreme resource density, particularly in memory capacity, making it a highly specialized hardware class. The qualitative cost profile reflects its position as a top-tier enterprise resource, where the high density of memory and dedicated vCPUs offsets the need for multi-node clustering. Tradeoffs include the absence of integrated GPU accelerators and a relatively small local storage capacity of 410 GB relative to the massive memory size, requiring external Premium Storage for large data volumes. The server is engineered for large-scale in-memory databases, massive SAP HANA deployments, heavy data warehousing, and complex enterprise resource planning systems.
description: Microsoft Azure M416ds_10_v3 is an x86_64 architecture server in the MDSHighMemoryv3 family, optimized for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. Running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, it features 416 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel processors and a massive 9496.0 GB of system memory, providing 22.83 GB of RAM per core. The instance includes 410 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage for high-performance disk configurations. Given its extreme memory density and massive compute footprint, this server represents a highly specialized hardware class designed to consolidate large-scale workloads. It is suited for demanding workloads such as large-scale in-memory databases, SAP HANA, massive data warehousing, and enterprise resource planning systems where memory capacity is the primary constraint.

tagline: An ultra-high-memory instance featuring massive x86_64 compute capacity and extensive RAM density for enterprise in-memory database workloads.
